div.div: Linking keys are logical (no FK constraints): token_id = gotchi · wallet / owner = address · tx_hash = idempotency key. • = primary key · 🔒 = encrypted at rest. companion / soul / roast tables live in companion.db; auto-renew uses autorenew.db.
